_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Ability to assess organizational compliance posture across multiple jurisdictions simultaneously, identifying coverage gaps, requirement conflicts, and opportunities for harmonized compliance approaches.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. Ability RC-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-S-001 (RC, cosine: 0.566), SP-T-006 (SP, cosine: 0.550).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.7/10 (raw 0.372). Shared vocabulary: [compliance, gaps, organizational]. NICE-only terms [identify, privacy] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, across, approaches, assess, conflicts, coverage] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.888 (P=0.914, R=0.864). P exceeds R by 0.050 — the NICE element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 21 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Identify organizational privacy compliance gaps" and "Ability to assess organizational compliance posture across multiple jurisdiction" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.663 > STS 0.372 (gap +0.291). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [compliance, gaps, organizational] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.6%. Shared tokens: [compliance, gaps, organizational]. NICE-only: [identify, privacy]. WIDAI-only: [ability, across, approaches, assess, conflicts, coverage].
